log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a UPX compressed PE32 executable, likely a spreader with persistence capabilities. Investigate the network activity to understand its behavior.
The sample performed a DNS lookup on vboxsvr.ovh.net, but no IP resolution was found. Investigate the registry changes to understand its persistence mechanisms.
The sample has two persistence mechanisms through the Windows Run registry key, pointing to mssrv.exe. Investigate the dropped files to understand its payload.
The sample dropped a large number of files with explicit content, likely as a payload to spread the malware. Investigate the process activity to understand its execution chain.
